title: ziziphus jujuba var. abyssinica
intro: Ziziphus jujuba var. abyssinica, also known as the Abyssinian jujube or Ethiopian jujube, is a plant species within the Rhamnaceae family, specifically a variety of the Ziziphus jujuba tree. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ziziphus jujuba var. abyssinica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a powder or added to supplements.
